_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the rpa-serverless-robot-units scenario. The agent chains folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get -> jobs logs -> jobs history. Discriminating evidence: the job is RuntimeType Serverless with history Pending->Faulted (never Running) and the explicit message 'Your tenant's assigned Robot Units have been exceeded' — a tenant-scope licensing/quota limit, not an executor/session/credential fault. machines list is empty (serverless jobs do not bind a listed machine template). Specific rules precede generic ones (first-match-wins).

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any unmatched uip command returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
